ItacPersonItem.Notes: Pellegrino joined the Notti Vaticane Academy in 1563, and proposed the study and discussion of religious subjects. See the biography of `Amalteo, Giovanni Battista`, in DBI.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
